title: Google — 广告主视角(Google Ads / AdWords)

description.en: Google Ads (formerly AdWords) as the advertiser experiences it: keyword auction, conversion attribution, billions in spend annually. The 'money side' of the platform — what funds the searchers' free experience.
description.zh: 广告主眼中的 Google Ads(原 AdWords):关键词竞价、转化归因,每年百亿级广告花费。这是平台的「收钱方」—— 它支付了搜索者的免费体验。
